parameters.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-GB">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Jully Ribas Aesthetics</title>

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Bricolage+Grotesque:opsz,wght@12..96,400;12..96,500;12..96,600;12..96,700;12..96,800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    :root {
      --terracota: #8D5A48;
      --rose: #C27864;
      --rose-suave: #E8BDB0;
      --areia: #F2E6DD;
      --creme: #FBF6F1;
      --dourado: #D4AF7A;
      --marrom: #4A2E23;
      --text: #4A2E23;
      --muted: #8D5A48;
      --radius: 18px;
      --maxw: 1160px;
      --font-display: "Instrument Serif", Georgia, serif;
      --font: "Bricolage Grotesque", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    ::selection { background: var(--rose); color: var(--creme); }

    /* Cursor glow: follows pointer, ignored on touch/reduced-motion */
    .cursor-glow {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 480px; height: 480px;
      border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(212,175,122,.16), transparent 70%);
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity .4s ease;
      will-change: transform;
    }
    @media (hover: none) { .cursor-glow { display: none; } }

    body {
      font-family: var(--font);
      background: var(--creme);
      color: var(--text);
      line-height: 1.65;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }
    .container { width: 100%; max-width: var(--maxw); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }

    .icon { width: 1.25em; height: 1.25em; fill: currentColor; vertical-align: middle; flex-shrink: 0; }

    a { color: inherit; }

    /* ---------- Header ---------- */
    header {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40;
      background: rgba(251, 246, 241, 0.72);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(1.4);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(1.4);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(141, 90, 72, 0.1);
      transition: box-shadow .3s ease, border-color .3s ease;
    }
    header.is-scrolled {
      box-shadow: 0 8px 30px -12px rgba(74,46,35,.18);
      border-color: rgba(141, 90, 72, 0.16);
    }
    .nav {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 20px 0;
      transition: padding .25s ease;
    }
    header.is-scrolled .nav { padding: 13px 0; }

    .logo-mark {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .logo-mark img {
      width: 46px; height: 46px; flex-shrink: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform .3s ease;
    }
    .logo-mark:hover img { transform: rotate(-4deg) scale(1.04); }
    .logo-word {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      font-style: italic;
      color: var(--marrom);
      letter-spacing: -.01em;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .logo-word span {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--font);
      font-style: normal;
      font-size: .62rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--rose);
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 8px; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 8px 4px;
      text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--marrom);
      transition: color .15s ease;
    }
    .nav-links a::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; left: 4px; right: 4px; bottom: 4px; height: 1.5px;
      background: var(--rose);
      transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
      transition: transform .25s ease;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--rose); }
    .nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
    @media (max-width: 720px) { .nav-links { display: none; } }

    .btn {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--terracota); color: var(--creme);
      font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem;
      transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease, background .18s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(141, 90, 72, .25);
      border: none; cursor: pointer;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .btn::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: -60%; width: 40%; height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.35), transparent);
      transform: skewX(-20deg);
      transition: left .6s ease;
    }
    .btn:hover::before { left: 130%; }
    .btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: var(--rose); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(194, 120, 100, .35); }
    .btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--dourado); outline-offset: 3px; }
    .btn-nav { padding: 11px 22px; font-size: .875rem; }
    .btn-outline {
      background: transparent; color: var(--terracota);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--terracota); box-shadow: none;
    }
    .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--terracota); color: var(--creme); }

    /* ---------- Hero ---------- */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      padding: 88px 0 110px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 85% 10%, rgba(212,175,122,.28), transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 60% at 10% 90%, rgba(194,120,100,.18), transparent 60%);
      background-size: 140% 140%;
      animation: bg-drift 16s ease-in-out infinite;
      z-index: 0;
    }
    @keyframes bg-drift {
      0%, 100% { background-position: 0% 0%, 0% 0%; }
      50% { background-position: 8% 6%, -6% -8%; }
    }
    .hero-blob {
      position: absolute; z-index: 0; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(2px);
      opacity: .5; pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-blob-1 {
      width: 340px; height: 340px; top: -80px; right: 8%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, var(--rose-suave), transparent 70%);
      animation: blob-float 9s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .hero-blob-2 {
      width: 220px; height: 220px; bottom: -40px; left: 4%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, var(--dourado), transparent 70%);
      animation: blob-float 11s ease-in-out infinite reverse;
    }
    @keyframes blob-float {
      0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
      50% { transform: translate(-18px, 22px) scale(1.08); }
    }
    .hero-grid {
      position: relative; z-index: 1;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr .9fr; gap: 56px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } }

    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--rose); margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 28px; height: 1.5px; background: var(--dourado); }

    .hero h1 {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.4rem);
      line-height: 1.05;
      letter-spacing: -.01em;
      color: var(--marrom);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .hero h1 .word { display: inline-block; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); animation: word-in .8s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) forwards; }
    .hero h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--rose); font-weight: 400; }
    @keyframes word-in { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

    .hero p.lead {
      margin: 24px 0 32px;
      font-size: 1.125rem;
      color: var(--terracota);
      max-width: 46ch;
      opacity: 0; animation: fade-up .8s ease .5s forwards;
    }
    .hero-actions { opacity: 0; animation: fade-up .8s ease .7s forwards; }
    @keyframes fade-up { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(14px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

    .hero-actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; align-items: center; }
    .hero-note { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: .875rem; color: var(--terracota); }

    .hero-photo {
      position: relative;
      border-radius: 28px;
      overflow: hidden;
      aspect-ratio: 4/5;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(74, 46, 35, .35);
      transition: transform .1s linear;
    }
    .hero-photo-inner { width: 100%; height: 110%; transition: transform .6s ease; }
    .hero-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
    .hero-photo:hover .hero-photo-inner { transform: scale(1.04); }
    .hero-photo::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit;
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(251,246,241,.25);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(74,46,35,0) 60%, rgba(74,46,35,.35));
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-photo-badge {
      position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 20px; right: 20px;
      background: rgba(251,246,241,.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px 18px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    }
    .hero-photo-badge .avatar {
      width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .hero-photo-badge .avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
    .hero-photo-badge strong { display: block; font-size: .9rem; color: var(--marrom); }
    .hero-photo-badge span { font-size: .78rem; color: var(--terracota); }

    /* ---------- Stats ---------- */
    .stats {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px;
      padding: 40px 0;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.12);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.12);
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { .stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; text-align: center; } }
    .stat strong {
      display: block; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--terracota);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .stat span { font-size: .875rem; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ---------- Sections ---------- */
    section { padding: 96px 0; }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { section { padding: 64px 0; } }

    .section-head { max-width: 640px; margin-bottom: 56px; }
    .section-head h2 {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.6vw, 2.6rem);
      color: var(--marrom);
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -.01em;
      margin-top: 12px;
    }
    .section-head p { color: var(--terracota); margin-top: 16px; font-size: 1.05rem; }
    .section-head.center { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center; }

    /* ---------- Sobre ---------- */
    .sobre { background: var(--areia); }
    .sobre-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: .85fr 1.15fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .sobre-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } }
    .sobre-photo {
      border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 3/4;
      box-shadow: 0 24px 48px -16px rgba(74,46,35,.28);
    }
    .sobre-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
    .sobre-text h2 {
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.4vw, 2.4rem);
      color: var(--marrom); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .sobre-text p { color: var(--terracota); margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: 1.05rem; }
    .sobre-text p:last-of-type { margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .assinatura-svg { width: 220px; height: 70px; overflow: visible; }
    .assinatura-svg path {
      fill: none; stroke: var(--rose); stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
      stroke-dasharray: 620; stroke-dashoffset: 620;
    }
    .assinatura-svg.is-visible path { animation: sign-draw 1.8s ease forwards .2s; }
    @keyframes sign-draw { to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; } }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .assinatura-svg path { stroke-dashoffset: 0; } }

    /* ---------- Serviços ---------- */
    .servicos-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 28px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .servicos-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { .servicos-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

    .servico-card {
      position: relative;
      background: var(--creme);
      border: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.14);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 32px 28px;
      transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      will-change: transform;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .servico-card .spotlight {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; opacity: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(260px circle at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%), rgba(212,175,122,.22), transparent 65%);
      transition: opacity .3s ease;
    }
    .servico-card:hover .spotlight { opacity: 1; }
    .servico-card > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
    .servico-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: -2px; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) + 2px); z-index: -1;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dourado), var(--rose));
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s ease;
    }
    .servico-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-4px);
      box-shadow: 0 24px 48px -20px rgba(141,90,72,.35);
    }
    .servico-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
    .servico-icon {
      width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rose-suave), var(--areia));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: var(--terracota); margin-bottom: 20px;
      transition: transform .3s ease;
    }
    .servico-card:hover .servico-icon { transform: rotate(-6deg) scale(1.08); }
    .servico-icon .icon { width: 26px; height: 26px; }
    .servico-card h3 {
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--marrom); margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .servico-card p { color: var(--terracota); font-size: .95rem; }

    /* ---------- Galeria (carrossel) ---------- */
    .galeria { background: var(--areia); }
    .carrossel { position: relative; }
    .carrossel-track {
      display: grid;
      grid-auto-flow: column;
      grid-auto-columns: calc((100% - 2 * 24px) / 3);
      gap: 24px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      padding-bottom: 8px;
      -ms-overflow-style: none;
      scrollbar-width: none;
    }
    .carrossel-track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    .carrossel-track.is-static {
      grid-auto-flow: unset;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--slide-count, 3), 1fr);
      overflow-x: visible;
    }
    .carrossel-item {
      scroll-snap-align: start;
      border-radius: 18px;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      display: block;
      aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    }
    .carrossel-item::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, rgba(74,46,35,.55));
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s ease;
    }
    .carrossel-item:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
    .carrossel-item img {
      width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform .5s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    }
    .carrossel-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); }

    .carrossel-nav {
      display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 20px;
      margin-top: 28px;
    }
    .carrossel-btn {
      width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--creme); border: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.2);
      color: var(--terracota); cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      transition: background .2s ease, color .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
    }
    .carrossel-btn:hover { background: var(--terracota); color: var(--creme); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .carrossel-btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--dourado); outline-offset: 2px; }
    .carrossel-btn .icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; }
    .carrossel-btn[disabled] { opacity: .35; cursor: default; transform: none; }
    .carrossel-btn[disabled]:hover { background: var(--creme); color: var(--terracota); }

    .carrossel-dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
    .carrossel-dot {
      width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(141,90,72,.25); border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0;
      transition: background .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
    }
    .carrossel-dot.is-active { background: var(--terracota); transform: scale(1.3); }

    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .carrossel-track { grid-auto-columns: calc((100% - 24px) / 2); }
      .carrossel-track.is-static { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    }
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .carrossel-track { grid-auto-columns: 84%; }
      .carrossel-track.is-static { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    /* ---------- Depoimentos ---------- */
    .depoimentos-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 28px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .depoimentos-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
    .depoimento-card {
      position: relative;
      background: var(--creme);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 32px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.14);
      transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .depoimento-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 24px 48px -22px rgba(141,90,72,.3); }
    .depoimento-card::before {
      content: '"';
      position: absolute; top: -30px; right: 16px;
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 9rem; font-style: italic;
      color: var(--areia); z-index: 0; line-height: 1;
    }
    .depoimento-card > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
    .stars { display: flex; gap: 4px; color: var(--dourado); margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .stars .icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
    .depoimento-card p { color: var(--marrom); font-size: .98rem; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .depoimento-autor { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .depoimento-autor .dot {
      width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rose), var(--dourado));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: var(--creme); font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 600;
    }
    .depoimento-autor strong { display: block; font-size: .9rem; color: var(--marrom); }
    .depoimento-autor span { font-size: .8rem; color: var(--terracota); }

    /* ---------- CTA final ---------- */
    .cta-final {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--terracota), var(--marrom));
      border-radius: 32px;
      margin: 0 24px;
      padding: 72px 40px;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .cta-final::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 80% at 50% 0%, rgba(212,175,122,.25), transparent 60%);
    }
    .cta-final-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .cta-final h2 {
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
      color: var(--creme); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .cta-final p { color: var(--rose-suave); margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 1.05rem; }
    .cta-final .btn { background: var(--dourado); color: var(--marrom); }
    .cta-final .btn:hover { background: var(--creme); }

    /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
    footer { padding: 56px 0 40px; }
    .footer-grid {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 24px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      padding-bottom: 32px; margin-bottom: 24px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(141,90,72,.14);
    }
    .footer-social { display: flex; gap: 12px; }
    .footer-social a {
      width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      background: var(--areia); color: var(--terracota);
      text-decoration: none; transition: background .15s ease, color .15s ease;
    }
    .footer-social a:hover { background: var(--terracota); color: var(--creme); }
    .footer-bottom {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
      font-size: .85rem; color: var(--terracota);
    }

    /* ---------- WhatsApp flutuante ---------- */
    .wa-float {
      position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 50;
      width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: #25D366; color: #fff;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      text-decoration: none;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(37, 211, 102, .45);
      animation: wa-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .wa-float .icon { width: 30px; height: 30px; }
    .wa-float:hover { transform: scale(1.08); }
    .wa-float:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--dourado); outline-offset: 3px; }
    @keyframes wa-pulse {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.45); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.7), 0 0 0 10px rgba(37,211,102,.12); }
    }

    /* ---------- Reveal ---------- */
    .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease; }
    .reveal.is-visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; }
      .reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    }
  </style>
</head>

  <a class="wa-float" href="https://wa.me/353852573125?text=Hello%20Jully%2C%20I%27d%20like%20to%20book%20a%20consultation." aria-label="Message us on WhatsApp">
    <svg class="icon"><use href="#i-whatsapp"/></svg>
  </a>

  <script>
    const reduceMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

    // Reveal on-scroll
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('is-visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
    }, { threshold: 0.15 });
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

    // Animated stat counters, triggered once when in view
    const counters = document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
    const countObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
        countObs.unobserve(entry.target);
        const el = entry.target;
        const target = parseInt(el.dataset.count, 10);
        const suffix = el.dataset.suffix || '';
        if (reduceMotion) { el.textContent = target + suffix; return; }
        const duration = 1400;
        const start = performance.now();
        const step = (now) => {
          const progress = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
          const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
          el.textContent = Math.round(target * eased) + suffix;
          if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
        };
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.5 });
    counters.forEach(el => countObs.observe(el));

    // Cursor glow follows pointer (desktop only)
    const glow = document.getElementById('cursorGlow');
    if (glow && !reduceMotion) {
      window.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
        glow.style.opacity = '1';
        glow.style.transform = `translate(${e.clientX}px, ${e.clientY}px) translate(-50%, -50%)`;
      });
      window.addEventListener('pointerleave', () => { glow.style.opacity = '0'; });
    }

    // Spotlight tracking on service cards
    if (!reduceMotion) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.servico-card').forEach(card => {
        card.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
          const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
          card.style.setProperty('--mx', `${e.clientX - rect.left}px`);
          card.style.setProperty('--my', `${e.clientY - rect.top}px`);
        });
      });
    }

    // Gallery carousel: scroll-snap track driven by prev/next buttons + dots
    (function () {
      const track = document.getElementById('carrosselTrack');
      const prevBtn = document.getElementById('carrosselPrev');
      const nextBtn = document.getElementById('carrosselNext');
      const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('carrosselDots');
      if (!track || !prevBtn || !nextBtn || !dotsWrap) return;

      const items = Array.from(track.children);

      // With 3 or fewer photos everything fits on screen at once: lay them
      // out as a static row instead of a scrollable track, and skip nav.
      if (items.length <= 3) {
        track.classList.add('is-static');
        track.style.setProperty('--slide-count', String(items.length));
        const nav = document.querySelector('.carrossel-nav');
        if (nav) nav.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }

      items.forEach((_, i) => {
        const dot = document.createElement('button');
        dot.className = 'carrossel-dot';
        dot.setAttribute('aria-label', `Go to photo ${i + 1}`);
        dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
          items[i].scrollIntoView({ behavior: reduceMotion ? 'auto' : 'smooth', inline: 'start', block: 'nearest' });
        });
        dotsWrap.appendChild(dot);
      });
      const dots = Array.from(dotsWrap.children);
      const nav = document.querySelector('.carrossel-nav');

      const updateUI = () => {
        const maxScroll = track.scrollWidth - track.clientWidth;
        const hasOverflow = maxScroll > 4;
        if (nav) nav.style.display = hasOverflow ? 'flex' : 'none';
        if (!hasOverflow) return;
        prevBtn.disabled = track.scrollLeft <= 4;
        nextBtn.disabled = track.scrollLeft >= maxScroll - 4;
        const activeIndex = Math.round(track.scrollLeft / items[0].getBoundingClientRect().width);
        dots.forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('is-active', i === activeIndex));
      };

      prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        track.scrollBy({ left: -items[0].getBoundingClientRect().width - 24, behavior: reduceMotion ? 'auto' : 'smooth' });
      });
      nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        track.scrollBy({ left: items[0].getBoundingClientRect().width + 24, behavior: reduceMotion ? 'auto' : 'smooth' });
      });
      track.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(updateUI);
      }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('resize', updateUI);
      updateUI();
    })();

    // Header gains a shadow and shrinks slightly once the page scrolls
    const header = document.querySelector('header');
    if (header) {
      const toggleHeader = () => header.classList.toggle('is-scrolled', window.scrollY > 12);
      window.addEventListener('scroll', toggleHeader, { passive: true });
      toggleHeader();
    }

    // Subtle hero photo parallax on scroll (targets the outer wrapper so it
    // never fights with the CSS hover scale on .hero-photo-inner)
    const heroPhoto = document.querySelector('.hero-photo');
    if (heroPhoto && !reduceMotion) {
      window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        const y = Math.min(window.scrollY, 400);
        heroPhoto.style.transform = `translateY(${y * 0.08}px)`;
      }, { passive: true });
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>
